title: MULTIMODAL ROBOTIC SYSTEM
what: Full-stack architecture and development of a multimodal robotic system
Bio-inspired air and water gait behavior — chassis development for transitioning media
how: Compliant materials and subtractive manufacturing for actuator and structural component fabrication
Design for assembly (DFA) across mechanical, electrical, and software subsystems
ROS2-based control software and sensor integration
Automated/Systematic testing procedures across air, water, and transitioning media
results: Expected: novel multimodal gait behavior characterization across air and water media
Ongoing: autonomous air and water gait behavior testing; full-system integration from mechanics to software stack
